What We Covered In This Module:
✓ Ideal Order Form Elements!
✓ The Essence Of Good Affirmation Copy!
✓ How To Get Started With SamCart!
✓ How To 	Build Your Upsell Sequences With SamCart
Module 5

-- 1 of 2 --

What To Do Now:
1. 	Decide How You’re Going To Accept Orders (i.e. SamCart or
other platform)!
2. 	(If other platform) Design your Order Form using the 5 Criteria!
3. 	(If using SamCart) 	Register For A SamCart Account (You get a
special 6FFF Customer-Only Discount)!
4. 	(If using SamCart) Set-up your Customer Captivation Offer
